items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds. He added that the market is not fully re

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB.US), the world's largest lithium producer, noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing, contrasting with the irregularity of demand from electric vehicles. Grid energy storage is more evenly distributed globally, which is a very interestin

items.headline: Lithium mining concept stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell. US Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi upgrades to Buy
items.snippet: Citi raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB), a global lithium producer, from High Risk to Buy, with target price remaining at $225. Citi stated the market is underestimating Albemarle's growth potential. ESS battery production this year will reach approximately 950 GWh,

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC
